preguntas.pregunta: The company suffered heavy losses, ...... forcing it to reduce staff.
...... the weather was terrible, we decided to go for a walk.
We went out for a long walk ...... the terrible weather.
The project failed completely ...... a lack of proper funding.
He stayed up late ...... complete the financial report on time.
She hid the confidential letter ...... anyone else should read it.
You can borrow my car ...... you promise to drive carefully.
Take an umbrella with you ...... it rains heavily later.
We won't go to the beach ...... the weather improves drastically.
The situation is critical, ...... the need for immediate action.
They are dynamic, ...... their main competitors are slow to react.
You need to submit it today; ...... your application will be rejected.
He is an exceptional teacher, ...... can be proven by his results.
The person ...... car was stolen has gone to the police station.
That's the historic restaurant ...... we had dinner last week.
We evaluate the pedagogical impact, ...... simple it may seem.
I am taking a phonetics course ...... improve my pronunciation.
The presentation was far from perfect; ______, it raised valid questions.
The new legislation is complex. ______ , it is difficult to enforce.
The device is small, light, and ...... very easy to carry.
